Zonehaven is now Genasys Protect
Home
Posted on June 28, 2023
Zonehaven AWARE is now Genasys Protect
An urgent and important announcement from the Lake County Sheriff’s Office of Emergency Services.
Lake County, CA (June 28, 2023) -- Effective Tuesday, June 27, 2023, Zonehaven AWARE has changed its name to Genasys Protect.
Only the name is changing. Zone information and zone numbers
will not
be changing.
At this time, all QR codes and other web addresses/URLs (aware.zonehaven.com and community.zonehaven.com), past information provided by the Sheriff’s Office, and zone information are still relevant, still work, and will continue to function.
Starting in 2024, the URL will be consolidated to protect.genasys.com, only.
Again, this is a change in name only. The name change from Zonehaven to Genasys Protect was a decision made by Genasys Protect.
Do You Know Your Zone?
A Zone look-up tool is available on
www.lakesheriff.com
and
http://www.lakesheriff.com/about/oes
.
Please also sign up for LakeCoAlerts, and review other valuable preparedness resources, while visiting these webpages.
Lake County residents are encouraged to Prepare Now, and connect with your families and neighbors to help ensure needs can quickly be understood and met in the event of a disaster.
